modules.name: Learn
modules.title: Conditional Lessons
modules.instructions: Master zero, first, second, and third conditionals. Learn how to express real and unreal situations in different time frames.

modules.name: Write
modules.title: Conditional Writing
modules.instructions: Write sentences using different conditional structures to express hypothetical situations, regrets, and advice.

modules.name: Play
modules.title: Conditional Games
modules.instructions: Play games to practice forming and using conditional sentences in real contexts.

modules.name: Quiz
modules.title: Conditional Quiz
modules.instructions: Test your knowledge with multiple choice questions about conditional structures.

modules.name: Apply
modules.title: Conditional Challenge
modules.instructions: Apply conditional structures correctly in complex sentences and mixed conditionals.
